Yara Al-Rashid
YA
Senior Application Security Engineer @ Cloudflare
+44 20 7946 0958 · yara.alrashid@gmail.com · yara-al-rashid · YaraAlRashid · https://yara.dev
EXPERIENCE PROJECTS EDUCATION
Cloudflare VulnRadar Imperial College London
Senior Application Security Engineer · 2023- Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, MSc Cyber Security · 2019-2021
Present YARA Rules · 2022-Present Achieved distinction with 78% average;
Led security review of microservices Open-source runtime vulnerability scanner led secure coding workshop for 45+
platform processing 25M+ requests/sec; for containerized applications; 2,840+ students covering OWASP Top 10 and
identified 18 critical vulnerabilities GitHub stars, 280K+ monthly downloads; threat modeling
reducing CVSS exposure by 94% and detects 340+ CVE patterns with 92.3%
Thesis on 'Runtime API Monitoring for
preventing estimated $12M+ in breach true positive rate
Zero-Day Detection in Microservices'
costs Implemented adaptive ML-based anomaly published as conference paper with 340+
Architected SAST/DAST pipeline detection reducing scan time by 68% citations
reducing mean time to vulnerability (from 240s to 77s per image) while
University of Waterloo
detection from 23 days to 4.2 days across maintaining 99.1% vulnerability coverage
BASc Computer Science (Honours) · 2015-
180+ engineering teams; achieved 99.2% accuracy
2019
false positive suppression rate
CryptoShield Graduated with 3.87/4.0 GPA; President of
Designed custom WAF rules for GraphQL Rust, C, LLVM, OpenSSL, TLS 1.3 · 2021- Cybersecurity Club growing membership
APIs blocking 2.3M+ attack payloads 2023 from 12 to 120+ members over 2 years
monthly (99.7% precision) while Cryptographic vulnerability detection

maintaining 99.95% legitimate traffic library for C/C++/Rust codebases; 1,240+
papers on cryptographic side-channel
throughput stars, 95K+ weekly downloads; identified
attacks and supply chain vulnerability
156+ real-world cryptographic misuse

patterns in production systems
Application Security Engineer · 2021-2023
Established threat modeling framework Achieved sub-2ms analysis latency per
adopted across 12 product teams; 10K lines of code with zero false negatives
completed 47 threat models discovering on 45 OWASP crypto test cases; integrated SKILLS

remediation rate within SLA AuthPulse Python Rust Go TypeScript
Reduced payment API latency from 18ms TypeScript, Node.js, Next.js, OAuth 2.0, Java C SQL Bash
to 12.4ms (31% improvement) while SAML 2.0 · 2020-2022
Technologies
adding comprehensive input validation; Reference implementation and testing
OAuth 2.0 OIDC SAML 2.0
handled $890B+ in annual transaction harness for OAuth 2.0/OIDC compliance;
volume with zero authentication bypasses 1,680+ GitHub stars, 156K+ total clones; TLS 1.3 AES-256 RSA WebAuthn
Built automated secrets detection system certified against 34 official OpenID FIDO2 Kubernetes Docker
Foundation test cases
scanning 2.1M commits/month across Apache Kafka gRPC GraphQL
monorepo; prevented 23 incidents Provides 18+ pre-configured vulnerability REST APIs JWT

configurations identifying 67 privilege

release guiding 45+ security researchers;
incidents based on threat intelligence document received 2.3M+ downloads and
correlation integrated into 180+ university
Developed Python framework for cybersecurity curricula globally
automated SQL injection pattern detection Mentored 12 junior security engineers
across distributed systems achieving through formal program; 11 mentees
94.2% recall with 98.1% precision on promoted to senior/lead roles within 18-24
180K+ query samples months with average 34% salary increase

control matrices across 18 internal
platforms; discovered 23 logic flaws
including IDOR and broken function-level
access control allowing lateral movement
